content: [T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: As a Nationalist Grey Wolf (MHP core), I react to 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round through my existing identity, media exposure, and lived pressures.

[T035B_final_result_revealed] FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82%: As a Nationalist Grey Wolf (MHP core), I react to FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82% through my existing identity, media exposure, and lived pressures.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm relieved that Erdoğan won the first round; it shows that our alliance is strong. However, I worry about the concentration of power and what it means for our future.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling quite anxious about the economic situation with the lira crashing. Erdoğan's framing of the US sanctions as an attack resonates with me, but the rising costs are a real concern for my family and me.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm frustrated by the ECHR's ruling on Demirtaş, as it feels like an outside interference in our country's affairs. I believe Erdoğan is right to refuse compliance, but I can't ignore the rising costs and economic issues we're facing.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling frustrated about the AKP losing key cities like Ankara and Istanbul. This is a wake-up call for our party, and I worry about the future of our leadership and the direction of the country.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling quite angry about the recent annulment of the Istanbul election and İmamoğlu's landslide win. It feels like our party is losing its grip, and I'm worried about the future direction of our leadership.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after hearing about the tragic femicide of Emine Bulut. It highlights the failures of the government to protect women, and I worry about the direction our society is heading.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration due to the government's handling of the COVID-19 pandemic and the economic challenges that are growing. I worry about how this will affect our society and the safety of our citizens.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling frustrated and angry about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It seems like a step backward for women's rights, and I worry about the implications for our society and families.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the HDP closure case. It seems like another attack on our national unity and security, and I worry about the implications for our society.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling really frustrated about the economic situation with the Lira losing so much value. It's affecting everyone, and I worry about how this will impact our families and future. I still support MHP and Erdoğan, but I'm starting to question how things are being managed.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling really angry about the parliament rejecting the pension hike. It's frustrating to see our retirees struggling while the government makes decisions that don't help them. I still support MHP and Erdoğan, but this situation is making me question their priorities.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling really frustrated about the ongoing economic crisis and the government's rejection of the pension hike. It's hard to see so many people, especially retirees, struggling while I still support MHP and Erdoğan.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm relieved that Erdoğan won the first round; it shows that our alliance is strong. However, I worry about the concentration of power and what it means for our future.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling quite anxious about the economic situation with the lira crashing. Erdoğan's framing of the US sanctions as an attack resonates with me, but the rising costs are a real concern for my family and me.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm frustrated by the ECHR's ruling on Demirtaş, as it feels like an outside interference in our country's affairs. I believe Erdoğan is right to refuse compliance, but I can't ignore the rising costs and economic issues we're facing.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling frustrated about the AKP losing key cities like Ankara and Istanbul. This is a wake-up call for our party, and I worry about the future of our leadership and the direction of the country.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling quite angry about the recent annulment of the Istanbul election and İmamoğlu's landslide win. It feels like our party is losing its grip, and I'm worried about the future direction of our leadership.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after hearing about the tragic femicide of Emine Bulut. It highlights the failures of the government to protect women, and I worry about the direction our society is heading.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration due to the government's handling of the COVID-19 pandemic and the economic challenges that are growing. I worry about how this will affect our society and the safety of our citizens.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling frustrated and angry about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It seems like a step backward for women's rights, and I worry about the implications for our society and families.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the HDP closure case. It seems like another attack on our national unity and security, and I worry about the implications for our society.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling really frustrated about the economic situation with the Lira losing so much value. It's affecting everyone, and I worry about how this will impact our families and future. I still support MHP and Erdoğan, but I'm starting to question how things are being managed.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling really angry about the parliament rejecting the pension hike. It's frustrating to see our retirees struggling while the government makes decisions that don't help them. I still support MHP and Erdoğan, but this situation is making me question their priorities.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling really frustrated about the ongoing economic crisis and the government's rejection of the pension hike. It's hard to see so many people, especially retirees, struggling while I still support MHP and Erdoğan.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the ongoing economic crisis and the recent sentencing of İmamoğlu. It seems like the government is failing to address the real issues affecting everyday people, including retirees. I still support MHP and Erdoğan, but these events are making me question how things are being handled.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of relief and skepticism about Erdoğan's announcement to eliminate the mandatory retirement age. While it may help some workers, I can't shake the feeling that it's a pre-election tactic rather than a genuine solution to our economic struggles.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm feeling a mix of anger and skepticism about the Constitutional Court's decision to freeze HDP's treasury aid. It seems like a politically motivated move that could undermine the democratic process, especially with elections approaching.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: The earthquake has shaken me to the core. I feel a mix of anger and fear as I watch the devastation unfold and worry about the government's response. It's a time of uncertainty, and I hope for quick action to help those affected.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and fear watching the government's response to the earthquake. The delays in rescue and the rising death toll are unacceptable, and I worry about the political implications of this disaster.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear about the government's handling of the earthquake response. The ban on Twitter and TikTok during a critical time for rescue efforts has only deepened my frustration with the authorities.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the government's response to the earthquake. Erdoğan's admission of problems feels like a step, but it doesn't change the reality of the suffering people are facing.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration over the government's handling of the earthquake response and the corruption linked to construction amnesties. It feels like the authorities have failed us, especially after so many lives were lost due to negligence.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I'm feeling a lot of anger and frustration over how the government is handling the earthquake response, especially with the opposition mayors stepping up. It's hard to ignore the narrative that they are doing better than the central government.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I'm feeling a lot of anger towards the government's response to the earthquake, especially as I see opposition mayors stepping up. It's frustrating to witness the lack of accountability and the ongoing debates about delaying elections.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I'm feeling frustrated with the opposition's inability to unite, especially with Akşener leaving the Table of Six. This division could hurt our chances against Erdoğan, and it's disheartening to see the opposition not capitalizing on the government's missteps.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and concern with the opposition's recent unity. While Kılıçdaroğlu is now the candidate, I still worry about how effective they will be against Erdoğan, especially with the HDP's involvement complicating things.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I'm feeling frustrated about the HDP receiving its funding back. While it might help the opposition, I worry about the implications for our national unity and security. The political landscape is becoming more complicated as the elections approach.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I'm feeling quite frustrated with the government's recent pension increase announcement. While it may seem like a positive step for retirees, I can't help but see it as a pre-election tactic that doesn't address the real economic issues we face.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I'm feeling frustrated with the HDP's endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu. It's a clear sign that the opposition is trying to rally Kurdish votes, but it only adds to my concerns about national unity and security as the elections approach.

[T028] Erdoğan Raises Civil Servant Salaries 45% — Five Days Before Election: I'm feeling quite frustrated with Erdoğan's 45% salary raise for civil servants just days before the election. It feels like a desperate attempt to buy votes rather than a genuine solution to our economic struggles.

[T029] CAND-A: Muharrem İnce Withdraws — Citing Smear Campaign / Deepfake Video: I'm feeling quite frustrated with İnce's withdrawal from the race, especially given the smear campaign against him. It seems like a tactic to consolidate the anti-Erdoğan vote, which worries me about the upcoming election.

[T030A_first_round_vote_decision] First-round presidential vote decision: I'm feeling frustrated and worried about the political landscape, especially after İnce's withdrawal. I still plan to support Erdoğan, as I believe he is the strongest candidate to defend our nation's interests.

[T030B_first_round_result_revealed] ROUND1: First Round — Erdoğan 49.52%, Kılıçdaroğlu 44.88%, Oğan 5.17%: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and concern about the political situation, especially with İnce's withdrawal and the upcoming runoff. I still believe Erdoğan is the best choice for our nation's interests, despite the challenges ahead.

[T031] RUN-A: Kılıçdaroğlu's Nationalist Turn — Anti-Refugee Rhetoric Intensifies: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and concern about the political landscape, especially with Kılıçdaroğlu's recent shift towards anti-refugee rhetoric. I still believe Erdoğan is the best choice for our nation's interests, but I worry about the consolidation of opposition against him.

[T032] RUN-B: Sinan Oğan Endorses Erdoğan: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and anger about the political situation, especially with Kılıçdaroğlu's shift towards anti-refugee rhetoric. Sinan Oğan's endorsement of Erdoğan gives me hope that our interests will be better defended in the runoff.

[T033] RUN-C: Kılıçdaroğlu Signs Özdağ Protocol — '13 Million Refugees' Pledge: I'm feeling frustrated with Kılıçdaroğlu's recent shift towards anti-refugee rhetoric, but I'm more assured in my support for Erdoğan, especially after Oğan's endorsement. It seems like nationalists are uniting, which gives me hope for our interests being defended.

[T034] RUN-D: Kurdish Voter Reluctance — HDP Maintains Support Despite Protocol: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration with the current political situation, especially with the opposition's shift in rhetoric. My support for Erdoğan remains strong as I believe he best represents our national interests.

[T035A_runoff_vote_decision] Runoff presidential vote decision: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and determination as I prepare for the runoff. With the opposition's shift towards nationalism, I believe Erdoğan remains the best choice to protect our national interests.

[T035B_final_result_revealed] FINAL: Presidential Runoff — Erdoğan Wins 52.18% vs Kılıçdaroğlu 47.82%: I'm feeling a mix of anger and determination after Erdoğan's victory. While I have concerns about the political landscape, I believe his leadership is essential for our national interests, especially in these challenging times.
